title: Stories of my Dog's Life 2022
description: The dataset consists of self-administered written texts on the lives of pet dogs. The data were originally collected for a Master's thesis. The writing guidelines directed participants to write about the lives of their pet dogs. Respondents could describe individual events or outline their dog's life story. Respondents were given questions to facilitate writing, e.g. what kind of character their dog has and what kind of life experiences their dog has had. Respondents were also asked about their
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
